use_cases: Triggering form submissions in web applications
Primary call-to-action buttons in UI flows
Icon-based action buttons in toolbars and interfaces
ai_summary: A reusable Button component with Radix UI Slot integration and class-variance-authority for flexible styling. Supports multiple variants (default, destructive, outline, secondary, ghost, link) and sizes (default, sm, lg, icon). Built with TypeScript for type safety and follows shadcn/ui patterns.
